title: Ingress Queue Relief
recommendedActions: Dispatch crowd-flow lead to Gate B.
Open the overflow queue path and rebalance screening lanes.
Post a five-minute ingress advisory to gate supervisors.

title: Vertical Transport Outage
recommendedActions: Send engineering to Elevator 4 for diagnosis.
Assign accessibility support to the alternate route.
Update operations with restoration ETA or outage confirmation.

title: Wheelchair Assistance Dispatch
recommendedActions: Dispatch guest services to Section 112 with a wheelchair.
Coordinate the nearest accessible path from current position.
Confirm arrival and guest transfer over radio.
